fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The program copies the number from the Routing No. field in the Routing Line table.
The program uses this field internally to assign the routing quality measures to the routing lines.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different routing quality measure lines.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the quality measure.

fields.name: Min. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum value that must be met.

fields.name: Max. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum value that may be achieved.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the routing that the routing quality measure is related to.
The program copies the code from the Version Code field in the Routing Version table. If this quality measure is not set up for a routing version, this field will be empty.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that this routing quality measure refers to.
The program uses this field internally to assign the routing quality measures to the operation.
